description_long: This chair features a curved, wraparound backrest made of dark wood with a subtle grain texture, providing both support and a modern aesthetic. The seat is upholstered in a deep blue fabric, appearing soft and cushioned for comfort. Four sturdy, straight legs, also finished in a dark tone, support the structure and give it a stable stance. The backrest extends smoothly into the sides, partially enclosing the sitter and offering a sense of privacy. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as cafes, waiting areas, or stylish public spaces. The materials and construction suggest durability while maintaining a refined, minimalist look.
description: A modern chair with a curved dark wood backrest, deep blue cushioned seat, and four sturdy legs, blending comfort with contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved backrest and the plush blue seat, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlights the continuous curve of the backrest and the depth of the seat, with two legs in view.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full arc of the backrest and the solid construction of the chair's back.
description_view_3: Right rear angle emphasizes the enveloping backrest and the seat's thickness, with two legs visible.
